message:
test(reviews): add API route tests for GET and POST /api/reviews

15 tests covering: required param validation, content type validation,
oversized content id, pagination, sortBy fallback, invalid JSON,
missing fields, invalid rating, min/max content length, successful
submission with display name, and GET/POST roundtrip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
